01

About Me

I'm Yugal Dhanraj Bilawane, a B.Sc. Data Science student at Dharampeth M.P. Deo Memorial Science College, Nagpur — and I've already built AI systems that work in the real world.

While most students are still learning theory, I was deploying a YOLOv8 + EfficientNet wildlife detection system with sub-2-second GPS SMS alerts and building an AI-powered smart drilling machine with a live IoT dashboard. I believe in impact over grades.

I've completed an AICTE-approved AI & ML internship via IBM SkillBuild & Edunet Foundation, and was selected as a Google Student Ambassador — chosen for passion for AI and campus impact.

Simultaneously pursuing a Professional Certification in CSE from IIT Roorkee (ID: PCP IIT R C5 2442). My goal: build scalable, deployable AI that bridges research and the real world.

⚡ Ships Fast 🎯 Impact-Driven 🔬 Research-Backed 🌐 Cloud-Ready 🤝 Team Player

04

Projects

LIVE DETECTION
🔌 REAL HARDWARE
Aug 2025 – Jan 2026 · Lead Developer · 4 Months
🦁 AI-Powered Animal Detection & Alert System
End-to-end AI surveillance preventing human–wildlife conflicts — a crisis causing 400+ annual fatalities in India. Dual-model pipeline: YOLOv8 detection + EfficientNet-B0 classification. Arduino UNO R3 → NEO-6M GPS → Twilio SMS for sub-2s alerts. All under ₹5,000.
⚡ 95%+ Accuracy 🚀 30+ FPS ⏱ <2s Alert 💰 ~₹5,000
YOLOv8EfficientNet-B0PythonOpenCVArduinoTwilioGPS
🐙 GitHub ▶ Demo
📊 LIVE DASHBOARD
🔩 PROTOTYPE
Aug 2025 – Present · Lead Developer
🔩 Smart Drilling AI PRO Machine
AI-powered drilling system automating manual operations via real-time sensor data (Depth, RPM, Torque). Live Streamlit IoT dashboard with charts and high-torque alerts. Physical prototype: Linear Brushless Motor, Spindle Motor, Micro-Controller.
📉 30% Error Reduction 🛡 25% Safer 💸 20% Cost Saving
PythonStreamlitIoT SensorsReal-time MLArduino
🐙 GitHub 🔗 Live Demo
🧠 LIVE APP
Sep 2025 – Oct 2025 · Solo Developer
🧠 Digital Footprint Personality Mapper
ML-powered app predicting Big Five personality traits from social media behavior — posts, engagement, avg likes, response time. Interactive bar charts + behavioral profile generation.
🔍 Big Five Traits 📊 Live Streamlit
